source_jobs.title: Do you dream big and want to make an impact? Work with us.
source_jobs.description:
<p>We are always interested in expanding our teams with top talent: currently focused on hiring for Protein Science, Drug Development, Manufacturing, and Quality. Also interested in people who can meaningfully contribute to these teams: Translational Biology, Engineering, Bioinformatics, Machine Learning, IT, Laboratory Management, and Software Development. We receive a large volume of applications and are only able to contact those who are selected for an interview. All communication from our Talent Discovery team will come from an @abcellera.com email address.</p>
<p>#LI-DNP</p>
